summary: Iteration 56: All 3 new features tested and working - Territory tab shows ALL 4 zones, Hospital Intelligence with multi-department tracking, Competitive Intelligence with 24 tracked brands. 30/30 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Meta Pixel console warning '[Meta Pixel] - Invalid PixelID: null' is expected - placeholder ID needs real ID for production
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: 1) Territory tab now shows ALL 4 zones (zone_01-04) with accounts/hospitals/labs/penetration even when zones have 0 leads. Zones with 0 leads show red alert 'No leads yet — X accounts available for outreach'. 2) Hospital Intelligence tab shows 19 hospitals with engagement_depth (single/moderate/deep), upsell_opportunity count, missing_divisions. 3) Competitive Intelligence tab shows 24 tracked competitor brands, 0 mentions (expected since no competitor searches yet). All 6 analytics tabs render without errors.

territory_tab_all_4_zones.details: GET /api/geo/zone-analytics returns all 4 zones (zone_01, zone_02, zone_03, zone_04) with accounts, hospitals, labs, penetration_pct, missing_divisions, marketing_opportunity

zone_01_kukatpally.details: 365 accounts, 209 hospitals, 156 labs, 0 leads, 0% penetration, 13 missing divisions

zone_02_ameerpet_primary.details: 413 accounts, 276 hospitals, 138 labs, 5 leads, 1.21% penetration, marked as PRIMARY

zero_lead_zone_alert.details: Zones with 0 leads show red alert 'No leads yet — X accounts available for outreach'

zone_filter_buttons.details: All Zones + 4 individual zone filter buttons work correctly

hospital_intelligence_endpoint.details: GET /api/geo/hospital-intelligence returns 19 hospitals with engagement_depth, upsell_opportunity, missing_divisions

top_upsell_opportunities.details: Shows top 5 hospitals with most missing Meril divisions

tracked_competitor_brands.details: 24 brands tracked: Stryker, Zimmer Biomet, Medtronic, Abbott, Boston Scientific, DePuy Synthes, Smith & Nephew, etc.

competitor_ranking_section.details: Shows 'No competitor mentions detected yet' with tracking message

division_threat_map.details: Shows 'No division threats detected' with explanation

all_6_analytics_tabs.details: CRM Leads, Territory, Hospitals, Competitive Intel, Search Intelligence, WhatsApp - all render without errors

notes: All 3 major features working correctly. Competitive Intelligence shows 0 competitor mentions which is expected since no users have searched for competitor brand terms yet. The 24 tracked brands are displayed in the 'Actively Monitoring' section.
